gettext/bindtextdomain.name: bindtextdomain
gettext/bindtextdomain.description: Bind the domain to the locale directory localedir. More concretely, gettext will look for binary .mo files for the given domain using the path (on Unix): localedir/language/LC_MESSAGES/domain.mo, where language is searched for in the environment variables LANGUAGE, LC_ALL, LC_MESSAGES, and LANG respectively. If localedir is omitted or None, then the current binding for domain is returned. [1]
